name: prepend-non-string
expect:
!{
  :origin :qlang/eval
  :kind :type-error
  :thrown :PrependSubjectNotString
  :message "prepend expects String at position 1, got number"
  :operand "prepend"
  :position 1
  :expectedType "String"
  :actualType :number
  :actualValue 42
  :fault {:step `prepend("x")` :input 42}
  :trail null
}

name: append-non-string
expect:
!{
  :origin :qlang/eval
  :kind :type-error
  :thrown :AppendSubjectNotString
  :message "append expects String at position 1, got number"
  :operand "append"
  :position 1
  :expectedType "String"
  :actualType :number
  :actualValue 42
  :fault {:step `append("x")` :input 42}
  :trail null
}

name: table-non-vec
expect:
!{
  :origin :qlang/eval
  :kind :type-error
  :thrown :TableSubjectNotVec
  :message "table requires Vec subject, got number"
  :operand "table"
  :position "subject"
  :expectedType "Vec"
  :actualType :number
  :actualValue 42
  :fault {:step `table` :input 42}
  :trail null
}

name: table-mixed
expect:
!{
  :origin :qlang/eval
  :kind :type-error
  :thrown :TableRowNotMap
  :message "table: element 0 expects Map, got number"
  :operand "table"
  :index 0
  :expectedType "Map"
  :actualType :number
  :actualValue 42
  :fault {
    :step `table`
    :input [42 "hello"]
  }
  :trail null
}
